# Packages for the Hyprland desktop stack on Fedora.
# Consume with: xargs -a deps/packages.dnf.txt sudo dnf install -y

hyprland
waybar
quickshell
fuzzel
hyprlock
hypridle
xdg-desktop-portal-hyprland
xsettingsd
gvfs
polkit-gnome
btop
cava
gtk3
gtk4
grim
slurp
wl-clipboard
brightnessctl
playerctl
NetworkManager-tui
blueman
